sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110051" key="fage/swros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φᾰγέσωρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n110051.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">glutton,</tr_> and <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γαστὴρ</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
